nasb.text: The sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh were Iru, Elah and Naam; and the son of Elah was Kenaz.

esv.text: The sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh: Iru, Elah, and Naam; and the son of Elah: Kenaz.

cnv.text: 耶孚尼的兒子是迦勒；迦勒的兒子是以路、以拉和拿安；以拉的兒子是基納斯。

ccb.text: 耶孚尼的儿子是迦勒，迦勒的儿子是以路、以拉和拿安，以拉的儿子是基纳斯。
